title: Lazy Sunday Walnut Caramels
description: A salty and juicy dessert perfect for lazy Sundays, featuring sweet and crunchy walnuts in a caramel sauce that's easy to make and even easier to enjoy.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, combine the butter and sugar. Stir until smooth and well combined.
Add corn syrup and vanilla extract. Heat over medium-high heat, stirring frequently to prevent burning.
Increase heat to high and bring mixture to a boil, stirring constantly. Continue cooking for about 3 minutes or until it reaches a soft ball stage (235°F).
Remove from heat and carefully stir in the ground walnuts and salt until evenly coated. Let cool slightly before spreading onto parchment-lined baking sheets.
Chill in refrigerator for at least an hour, then slice into small pieces.
